footer.brief: Mindstec Distribution bridges the gap between the manufacturer and the dealer, increasing the efficiency of overall operations.

hero.label: About Us
hero.brief: Mindstec Distribution is a leading procurement and distribution specialist for high-end audio-visual solutions across the Middle East, Africa and Asia — bringing cutting-edge AV technology to these regions at accessible prices.
hero.caption: High-end AV, delivered

story.p1: We bridge the gap between global AV manufacturers and regional dealers — optimising supply chains, reducing costs and improving the efficiency of every operation in between.
story.p2: With deep market knowledge and a tech-savvy team, we help the world's AV brands expand into new markets, and we support our dealers with sales, marketing and promotion — fostering growth without competition.
story.more_p1: Committed to innovation and customer support, we continuously invest in technical expertise, ensuring seamless integration of AV solutions in high-profile projects worldwide.
story.more_p2: Driven by excellence and innovation, we empower businesses to stay at the forefront of the evolving AV industry.

pillars.label: What we do
pillars.p1_desc: We help global AV manufacturers expand into the Middle East, Africa and Asia — with local knowledge, an established dealer network and in-region logistics.
pillars.p2_desc: Procurement, warehousing and distribution tuned for the region — reducing costs, shortening lead times and improving the efficiency of every project.
pillars.p3_desc: Sales, marketing and promotional support for our dealers, plus the technical expertise to integrate AV solutions in high-profile projects — growth without competition.

vm.vision_desc: To be a distribution leader in futuristic, convergent, technology-driven system solutions.
vm.mission_desc: To be a regional leader in cutting-edge audio-visual system solution distribution — creating immense value for our supplier-dealer networks while being first and fastest in bringing the latest technology to the region.

team.label: Our team
team.lede: Industry experts, innovators and problem-solvers — collaborating to deliver top-tier AV solutions and seamless experiences for our partners.

hero.brief: Mindstec distributes professional AV technology from fifty-plus global manufacturers to the integrators, consultants and enterprises building the spaces people remember.

statement.side_text: Distribution is logistics only on paper. In practice it is product knowledge, demo stock, engineering support and someone who answers the phone.
statement.text: A screen in a boardroom. A wall of pixels in a terminal. A voice that carries to the last row.
statement.emText: Someone has to get that technology there
statement.postText: — sourced, specified and supported. That is the work we do.

solutions.label: Solutions
solutions.lede: Six verticals, one supply chain. Hover a category to see it in the field.

stats.installs_desc: Installations supplied and supported to date

edgeItems.title: A portfolio built over fifteen years
edgeItems.desc: We represent more than fifty manufacturers — Crestron to Samsung Professional — chosen so that an integrator can specify an entire project from one price list. No gaps, no grey imports.
edgeItems.caption: Brand network

edgeItems.title: Engineers, not order-takers
edgeItems.desc: Every category we carry has a product specialist behind it. We do system design reviews, run demos from our own stock, and stay on the escalation path long after the invoice is paid.
edgeItems.caption: Technical depth

edgeItems.title: Local teams in three markets
edgeItems.desc: Bangalore covers India and the SAARC region, our Africa office serves the continent's commercial hubs, and Warsaw handles Central and Eastern Europe — local currency, local warranty, local people.
edgeItems.caption: Regional teams

edgeItems.title: Support from enquiry to install
edgeItems.desc: Pre-sales consultation, procurement, logistics, commissioning help and after-sales service under one roof. Each partner gets a named account manager and a direct line to technical staff.
edgeItems.caption: End-to-end support

regions.lede: Stock, currency, warranty and people — all handled in-region.

hero.label: Our Partners
hero.brief: Twenty-five manufacturers, one price list. We represent the world's leading AV brands across displays, audio, broadcast, collaboration and connectivity — so our dealers can specify an entire project from a single partner.

why.label: For manufacturers & dealers
why.p1_desc: A curated portfolio that lets integrators specify an entire project — displays, audio, control, connectivity — from a single distribution partner.
why.p2_desc: Established dealer networks across the Middle East, Africa and Asia, with in-region stock, local currency and logistics built for each market.
why.p3_desc: We support dealers with sales, marketing and promotion — and we never compete with them. Product specialists back every brand we carry.

hero.title: E-Waste Management
hero.brief: Around 90% of electronic equipment is recyclable. Our authorized programme with Deshwal Waste Management takes back end-of-life electronics anywhere in India — at zero cost to you.

ov.label: Overview
ov.lede_main: Dumped in a landfill, old electronics leach lead and mercury into soil and groundwater. Recycled right, almost all of them
ov.p1: E-waste is the informal name for electronic products nearing the end of their useful life — computers, televisions, displays, copiers, phones, audio equipment and batteries. Many of their components contain hazardous materials that pose a real threat to human health and the environment when disposed of improperly.
ov.p2: Most of these products can be reused, refurbished or recycled in an environmentally sound manner. Under India's E-Waste (Management & Handling) Rules, Mindstec runs a compliant take-back programme so the hardware we distribute never ends up where it shouldn't.

recyclers.b1_desc: Metals recovered from circuit boards, and the plastics and glass in monitors and televisions, go into new products — reducing the need to mine new raw materials.
recyclers.b2_desc: Donated electronics become refurbished computers and phones for low-income families, schools and non-profits — access to technology they couldn't otherwise afford.
recyclers.b3_desc: With around 90% of electronic equipment recyclable, demand for recycling builds new firms and new jobs — and a second market for the recovered materials.
recyclers.b4_desc: CRTs and monitors contain lead; circuit boards carry cadmium, mercury and chromium. Safe recycling keeps these toxins out of trashcans, landfills and groundwater.

dd.label: Handle with care
dos: Check the product catalogue for end-of-life handling information before you dispose of anything.
Make sure only authorized recyclers and dismantlers handle your electronic products.
Call the toll-free line to dispose of products that have reached end of life.
Drop used electronics, batteries and accessories at your nearest authorized e-waste collection point.
Disconnect batteries and protect any glass surfaces against breakage before handing equipment over.
donts: Dismantle electronic products on your own.
Throw electronics into bins marked with the "Do not dispose" sign.
Hand e-waste to informal, unorganized collectors like local scrap dealers or rag pickers.
Mix electronics with municipal garbage that ultimately reaches landfills.

plan.label: The programme
plan.brief: In India, most e-waste ends up in the informal sector, recycled with no consideration for health or the environment. Abiding by all pertinent e-waste laws, Mindstec has partnered with Deshwal Waste Management Pvt. Ltd. — a recycler authorized by the appropriate government agencies — to provide drop-off centres and environmentally sound processing of end-of-life electronics.

steps.title: Raise a pickup request
steps.desc: Call the toll-free line 1800 102 9077, Monday to Friday, 10:00 AM – 5:30 PM — or drop your e-waste at any collection centre below.

steps.title: Collection & transport
steps.desc: Deshwal Waste Management, our authorized recycler, collects the equipment and transports it to the nearest collection centre.

steps.title: Environmentally sound recycling
steps.desc: Equipment is processed at government-authorized facilities in compliance with India's E-Waste Management & Handling Rules.

plan.note: No fee is charged for giving goods for recycling, and no monetary benefit is offered in return — the sole aim of the programme is to keep the environment clean.

hero.label: Experience Centre — Bengaluru
hero.desc: A hands-on floor where technology meets functionality — live control rooms, collaboration suites, signage and broadcast, running side by side so you can judge them the way your clients will.

ov.label: Overview
ov.lede: Spec sheets tell you what a system should do. The Experience Centre shows you what it actually does — live, integrated, and under real conditions.
ov.p1: Our Bengaluru Experience Centre is a dynamic, hands-on environment designed to showcase the power of integrated AV. The floor runs live demonstrations of control room systems, collaborative meeting technologies, digital signage and more — real products from 25 global brands, wired together the way they'd be deployed on site.
ov.p2: Visitors explore real-world applications, test system interoperability across brands, and work directly with our technical experts. Whether you're a consultant writing a spec, an integrator validating a design, or an enterprise client choosing a standard — this is the shortest path from shortlist to certainty.

zones.label: On the floor
zones.title: Six zones. All
zones.desc: Every zone runs shipping product — no mock-ups, no renders. Walk from one vertical to the next and see how the pieces interoperate.

zones_arr.name: Control Room Wall
zones_arr.desc: A 24/7-rated video wall driven by live processors — switch sources, split layouts and stress-test the workflow your operators will actually use.

zones_arr.name: Collaboration Suite
zones_arr.desc: A fully wired hybrid meeting room — interactive display, PTZ cameras, ceiling audio and room booking, joined to a real call so you can hear the difference.

zones_arr.name: Signage Gallery
zones_arr.desc: Indoor LED, professional panels and wayfinding running scheduled content from a live CMS — compare brightness, pitch and processing side by side.

zones_arr.name: Broadcast Corner
zones_arr.desc: Cameras, vision mixing and live graphics in a compact production setup — see a multi-camera stream go from lens to output in one take.

zones_arr.name: Audio & Hospitality Lounge
zones_arr.desc: Invisible and architectural speakers, guest-room IPTV and background audio staged as a lounge — technology that disappears until you press play.

zones_arr.name: AV-over-IP Backbone
zones_arr.desc: The rack room that ties the floor together — AV-over-IP switching, extension and control, so you can trace every signal path end to end.

film.label: The film
film.note: Filmed on the floor of our Bengaluru centre. Streams on demand — press play.

arr.name: Consultants
arr.desc: Validate a specification against live hardware before it goes to tender — compare brands in the same room, under the same light, on the same network.

arr.name: System Integrators
arr.desc: Prove a design to your client without building a demo room of your own. Bring them in, walk the floor, and close on what they've already seen working.

arr.name: Enterprise Clients
arr.desc: Choosing a standard for a hundred rooms? Sit in one first. Test the workflow, the audio and the ergonomics before you commit the budget.

visit.label: Plan your visit
visit.desc: Visits are guided and by appointment, so the floor is set up around what you're evaluating. Tell us what you want to see and we'll have it live when you arrive.

arr.title: Where
arr.desc: No. 5M-645, Banaswadi Village, OMBR Layout, Bangalore 560043, India

arr.desc: Tell us which zones you want live

digital-signage.name: Digital Signage
digital-signage.title: Digital Signage
digital-signage.intro: LED walls, professional display panels and wayfinding that turn retail floors, terminals and public spaces into media surfaces — with the software to run them.
digital-signage.capsSide: From a single menu board to a stadium facade — hardware, software and mounting from one price list.

caps.title: Indoor & outdoor LED
caps.desc: Fine-pitch indoor walls to high-brightness outdoor facades, with the receiving cards, spares and service to keep them lit.

caps.title: Professional display panels
caps.desc: Commercial-grade panels rated for continuous operation — portrait, landscape, high-brightness and touch.

caps.title: Wayfinding & kiosks
caps.desc: Interactive totems and self-service kiosks for malls, airports, hospitals and campuses.

caps.title: CMS & scheduling
caps.desc: Content management, day-parting and remote monitoring for networks of one screen or one thousand.

control-rooms.name: Control Rooms
control-rooms.title: Control Rooms
control-rooms.intro: 24/7-rated video walls, processors and operator workflows for command centres, surveillance suites and network operations — engineered for zero downtime.
control-rooms.capsSide: Mission-critical means no single point of failure — we spec redundancy from source to screen.

caps.title: Video wall processors
caps.desc: Hardware and software processing that puts any source on any display, at any size, without dropped frames.

caps.title: 24/7 mission-critical displays
caps.desc: Panels and LED rated for round-the-clock duty cycles, with redundant power and burn-in management.

caps.title: KVM & operator desks
caps.desc: Low-latency KVM so operators control every system from one seat, plus console furniture and ergonomics.

caps.title: Source & layout management
caps.desc: Preset layouts, alarm-triggered views and multi-operator workflows for the moments that matter.

conferencing.name: Conferencing & Collaboration
conferencing.title: Conferencing & Collaboration
conferencing.intro: Hybrid meeting rooms that sound as good as they look — interactive displays, cameras, ceiling audio and the AV-over-IP backbone connecting them.
conferencing.capsSide: Rooms people actually want to book — from huddle spaces to boardrooms and lecture theatres.

caps.title: Interactive displays
caps.desc: Touch collaboration displays for ideation, annotation and wireless presentation in any room size.

caps.title: Cameras & tracking
caps.desc: PTZ, ePTZ and auto-framing cameras that keep every participant in the shot, in any layout.

caps.title: Ceiling & beamforming audio
caps.desc: Microphones and speakers that disappear into the ceiling and still pick up the quietest voice.

caps.title: Booking & room intelligence
caps.desc: Scheduling panels, occupancy analytics and wayfinding that make the whole floor work harder.

hospitality.name: Hospitality AV
hospitality.title: Hospitality AV
hospitality.intro: Guest-room entertainment, ballroom systems and background audio for hotels, restaurants and venues — technology that stays invisible until it matters.
hospitality.capsSide: The best hospitality AV is the kind guests never notice — until the lights dim and the show starts.

caps.title: Guest-room entertainment
caps.desc: IPTV headends, casting and in-room control that feel like home — branded for the property.

caps.title: Ballroom & event spaces
caps.desc: Divisible-room audio, projection and LED for conferences, weddings and everything between.

caps.title: Background music & paging
caps.desc: Zoned audio that follows the mood from breakfast to last orders, with paging built in.

caps.title: Interactive hospitality tablets
caps.desc: Smart tables and in-room tablets for ordering, concierge and guest services.

broadcast.name: Broadcast & Production
broadcast.title: Broadcast & Production
broadcast.intro: Cameras, switching, live graphics and streaming infrastructure for broadcasters, studios and creators — from single-operator setups to full facilities.
broadcast.capsSide: From a one-person streaming desk to a national newsroom — the same signal discipline applies.

caps.title: Studio & PTZ cameras
caps.desc: Broadcast-grade imaging from fixed studio chains to remotely operated PTZ fleets.

caps.title: Vision mixing & switching
caps.desc: Production switchers and routing for live programmes, sport and events.

caps.title: Live graphics & virtual sets
caps.desc: Real-time graphics, augmented reality and virtual studio tools used by the world’s broadcasters.

caps.title: Streaming & delivery
caps.desc: Encoders, IPTV and OTT delivery that get the programme to every screen, reliably.

live-events.name: Live Events & Immersive
live-events.title: Live Events & Immersive
live-events.intro: Touring-grade LED, projection mapping and spatial audio for concerts, exhibitions and experiential spaces — built to survive the road.
live-events.capsSide: Rigged, run and struck in hours — event technology has no second chances, so we spec accordingly.

caps.title: Touring & rental LED
caps.desc: Fast-lock touring frames, curved arrays and floor systems built for load-in after load-in.

caps.title: Projection mapping
caps.desc: High-output projection and warping tools for architecture, stages and art installations.

caps.title: Spatial & concert audio
caps.desc: Point-source and immersive audio systems that scale from galleries to arenas.

caps.title: Show control
caps.desc: Timecode, triggering and media servers keeping lights, video and sound on the same beat.
